; Source: scripts/gen-corpus.ts (catalog-seeded corpus generator).
; Regenerate: `bun run gen:corpus`  Verify: `bun run gen:corpus:check`.
; Expected trees are captured from the built grammar, not hand-authored.

    (start_tag
      name: (name))
    (element
      (self_closing_tag
        name: (name)
        (d_attribute
          name: (d_attribute_name)
          value: (d_attribute_value
            (double_quoted_path_data
              (path_data_content
                (path_data
                  (moveto_segment
                    command: (path_command)
                    (path_coordinate_pair
                      (path_coordinate
                        (path_number))
                      (path_comma_wsp
                        (path_wsp))
                      (path_coordinate
                        (path_number))))
                  (path_wsp)
                  (lineto_segment
                    command: (path_command)
                    (path_coordinate_pair
                      (path_coordinate
                        (path_number))
                      (path_comma_wsp
                        (path_wsp))
                      (path_coordinate
                        (path_number)))))))))
        (number_list_attribute
          name: (number_list_attribute_name)
          value: (number_list_attribute_value
            (number_list
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number)

<svg><linearGradient gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox" x1="5"/></svg>

---

(source_file
  root: (svg_root_element
    (start_tag
      name: (name))
    (element
      (self_closing_tag
        name: (name)
        (keyword_attribute
          name: (keyword_attribute_name)
          value: (keyword_attribute_value
            (keyword_value)))
        (length_attribute
          name: (length_attribute_name)
          value: (length_attribute_value
            (length_or_percentage_or_auto
              (length_or_percentage
                (length
                  (number))))))))
    (end_tag
      name: (name)))
  (text))

========================================
Element marker (typed attributes)
========================================
<svg><marker markerHeight="5" markerUnits="strokeWidth" orient="sans-serif" viewBox="0 0 10 10"/></svg>

---

(source_file
  root: (svg_root_element
    (start_tag
      name: (name))
    (element
      (self_closing_tag
        name: (name)
        (length_attribute
          name: (length_attribute_name)
          value: (length_attribute_value
            (length_or_percentage_or_auto
              (length_or_percentage
                (length
                  (number))))))
        (keyword_attribute
          name: (keyword_attribute_name)
          value: (keyword_attribute_value
            (keyword_value)))
        (css_text_attribute
          name: (css_text_attribute_name)
          value: (css_text_attribute_value
            content: (css_attribute_text_double)))
        (viewbox_attribute
          name: (viewbox_attribute_name)
          value: (viewbox_attribute_value
            (viewbox_value
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number))))))
    (end_tag
      name: (name)))
  (text))

========================================
Element path (typed attributes)
========================================
<svg><path d="M0 0 L1 1" pathLength="0.5"/></svg>

---

(source_file
  root: (svg_root_element
    (start_tag
      name: (name))
    (element
      (self_closing_tag
        name: (name)
        (d_attribute
          name: (d_attribute_name)
          value: (d_attribute_value
            (double_quoted_path_data
              (path_data_content
                (path_data
                  (moveto_segment
                    command: (path_command)
                    (path_coordinate_pair
                      (path_coordinate
                        (path_number))
                      (path_comma_wsp
                        (path_wsp))
                      (path_coordinate
                        (path_number))))
                  (path_wsp)
                  (lineto_segment
                    command: (path_command)
                    (path_coordinate_pair
                      (path_coordinate
                        (path_number))
                      (path_comma_wsp
                        (path_wsp))
                      (path_coordinate
                        (path_number)))))))))
        (number_attribute
          name: (number_attribute_name)
          value: (number_attribute_value
            (number)))))
    (end_tag
      name: (name)))
  (text))

========================================
Element text (typed attributes)
========================================
<svg><text dx="1 2 3" lengthAdjust="spacing" rotate="0 1 0 1 0" textLength="5"/></svg>

---

(source_file
  root: (svg_root_element
    (start_tag
      name: (name))
    (element
      (self_closing_tag
        name: (name)
        (length_list_attribute
          name: (length_list_attribute_name)
          value: (length_list_attribute_value
            (length_list
              (length_or_percentage
                (length
                  (number)))
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (length_or_percentage
                (length
                  (number)))
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (length_or_percentage
                (length
                  (number))))))
        (keyword_attribute
          name: (keyword_attribute_name)
          value: (keyword_attribute_value
            (keyword_value)))
        (number_list_attribute
          name: (number_list_attribute_name)
          value: (number_list_attribute_value
            (number_list
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number))))
        (length_attribute
          name: (length_attribute_name)
          value: (length_attribute_value
            (length_or_percentage_or_auto
              (length_or_percentage
                (length
                  (number))))))))
    (end_tag
      name: (name)))
  (text))

  root: (svg_root_element
    (start_tag
      name: (name))
    (element
      (self_closing_tag
        name: (name)
        (keyword_attribute
          name: (keyword_attribute_name)
          value: (keyword_attribute_value
            (keyword_value)))
        (d_attribute
          name: (d_attribute_name)
          value: (d_attribute_value
            (double_quoted_path_data
              (path_data_content
                (path_data
                  (moveto_segment
                    command: (path_command)
                    (path_coordinate_pair
                      (path_coordinate
                        (path_number))
                      (path_comma_wsp
                        (path_wsp))
                      (path_coordinate
                        (path_number))))
                  (path_wsp)
                  (lineto_segment
                    command: (path_command)
                    (path_coordinate_pair
                      (path_coordinate
                        (path_number))
                      (path_comma_wsp
                        (path_wsp))
                      (path_coordinate
                        (path_number)))))))))

          name: (length_attribute_name)
          value: (length_attribute_value
            (length_or_percentage_or_auto

Element tspan (typed attributes)
========================================

---

(source_file
  root: (svg_root_element
    (start_tag
      name: (name))
    (element
      (self_closing_tag
        name: (name)
        (length_list_attribute
          name: (length_list_attribute_name)
          value: (length_list_attribute_value
            (length_list
              (length_or_percentage
                (length
                  (number)))
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (length_or_percentage
                (length
                  (number)))
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (length_or_percentage
                (length
                  (number))))))
        (keyword_attribute
          name: (keyword_attribute_name)
          value: (keyword_attribute_value
            (keyword_value)))
        (number_list_attribute
          name: (number_list_attribute_name)
          value: (number_list_attribute_value
            (number_list
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number)
              (comma_wsp
                (wsp))
              (number))))
        (length_attribute
          name: (length_attribute_name)
          value: (length_attribute_value
            (length_or_percentage_or_auto
              (length_or_percentage
                (length
                  (number))))))))
    (end_tag
      name: (name)))
  (text))
